posts.author: BuyRightSitTight
posts.text: Sales of GLP-1 drugs in India don’t seem to have taken off as expected. Refer this article and Nithin Kamat’s views: LinkedIn India is a weird market. With obesity rates shooting up, I'd have bet on the... India is a weird market. With obesity rates shooting up, I'd have bet on the sales of generic GLP-1s exploding once their patents expired. They now cost about Rs 1,000–2,500 a month, and there's growing evidence pointing to benefits well beyond... It kind of strengthens my wariness about Shaily’s prospects since it rides on the willingness of Indian targets to keep injecting themselves (as a…
